title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gati

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gati
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gati. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!
